Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a temporal profile for a specific supply chain process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process has 10 activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The temporal profile needs pairs of activities that eventually follow each other not just direct succession

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to estimate average times and standard deviations in seconds for a representative subset of these pairs

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The logic should follow the supply chain flow SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will calculate cumulative times for pairs separated by multiple steps

Name: Validation - PE
Text: I need to ensure the dictionary keys are tuples of strings activity codes and values are tuples of int float int float representing seconds
